summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Productie Werkbon 1 (new werkbon type for PUR insulation), 2-page structure for all werkbons (Oplevering, Project, Productie), Planning confirmation timestamp system, and home screen modal with Productie option. Backend: 11/11 tests passing. Frontend: All new features verified working on public preview URL.

ui_bugs.issue: 'pen-outline' is not a valid Ionicons icon name (console: 'pen-outline is not a valid icon name for family ionicons'). Icon won't render on page 2 banner across all 3 new werkbon types. Correct icon is 'pencil-outline'.

react_native_issues.issue: Ionicons name 'pen-outline' on page 2 banner is invalid. Use 'pencil-outline' instead. Lines: productie.tsx:688, oplevering.tsx:461, project.tsx:371

action_items: Fix invalid icon name 'pen-outline' -> 'pencil-outline' in productie.tsx:688, oplevering.tsx:461, project.tsx:371 (page 2 banner Ionicons)
critical_code_review_comments: productie.tsx line 688, oplevering.tsx line 461, project.tsx line 371: Ionicons name='pen-outline' is invalid. No icon renders on page 2 banner. Use 'pencil-outline' instead.
All 3 werkbon files use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL - consistent with existing code but project guidance prefers EXPO_BACKEND_URL. Minor env naming inconsistency.

success_rate.frontend: 98% (all critical flows pass; 1 minor icon display bug on page 2 banners)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned TEST_ProductieKlant_* and TEST_ProductieWerf_* during pytest run. Planning item created and cleaned for bevestig tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NO MOCKED API USED. All tests used public preview URL https://smart-ops-deploy.preview.emergentagent.com. Worker login (davy@smart-techbv.be / Smart1234-) and admin login (info@smart-techbv.be / Smart1988-) verified working. Productie Werkbon is fully new screen at /werkbon/productie - page 1 shows all required sections (Planning info, Klant chips, Werk beschrijving, PUR Productie with Gelijkvloers/1ste Verdiep/2de Verdiep, Extra werkzaamheden with Schuurwerken/Stofzuigen toggle, Photos, Opmerking). Voorziene uur auto-calculates from start/eind uur. Productie type visible in home modal. All 3 werkbons (Productie/Oplevering/Project) navigate to page 2 via Volgende button. Page 2 shows GPS, signature, selfie, privacy notice. Only issue: 'pen-outline' invalid Ionicons icon on page 2 banners (cosmetic).
rca_of_issue: pen-outline Ionicons issue: The Ionicons v5/v7 library does not include a 'pen-outline' icon. The available pencil/writing icons are 'pencil', 'pencil-outline', and 'pencil-sharp'. The code in productie.tsx:688, oplevering.tsx:461, and project.tsx:371 uses 'pen-outline' in the page 2 banner which causes no icon to render. Fix: replace 'pen-outline' with 'pencil-outline' in all 3 files.
